name: Cranberry Mince Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine sugar and cornstarch; add water. Over high heat, cook and stir until boiling.
2. Add cranberries; return to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Turn mincemeat into a pastry-lined 9 or 10-inch pie plate. Top with cranberries.
4. Cover with vented top crust; seal and flute. Brush egg mixture over the crust.
5. Bake at 425 degrees in the lower half of the oven for 30 minutes, or until golden brown. Cool.
6. Decorate with Egg Nog cream (recipe follows). Makes one 9 or 10-inch pie.
